headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Bio-Techne, Lowers Price Target to $54
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Daniel Markowitz   maintains Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $68 to $54.
